content.text: Let me read the contract source code to look for vulnerabilities.

I found a reentrancy vulnerability in the withdraw() function. The function uses msg.sender.call{value: bal} on line 12 before updating the balance to 0 on line 14. An attacker could deploy a contract with a receive() function that re-enters withdraw() before the balance is set to zero, draining the contract.

Severity: Critical
Investigation complete. Found reentrancy in withdraw().
